calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-1'S, Motion To Set Aside Dismissal.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 664.6 and enter judgment pursuant to conditional stipulated" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which tracks the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Off Calendar
